german_requirement.title: German Language Requirement is Not a Major Barrier
german_requirement.subtitle: A significant majority of roles do not require German proficiency, highlighting accessibility for non-German speakers.

pm_type.title: Core PMs Dominate, Leaving Customer-Facing Roles Behind
pm_type.subtitle: A significant gap exists between Core PMs and Customer-Facing PMs, indicating a concentration in product management roles.

seniority.title: Mid-level Roles Are Equally Prominent
seniority.subtitle: Senior and mid-level positions each represent 41% of the workforce.

work_mode.title: On-site Work Dominates Despite Remote Options
work_mode.subtitle: A significant portion of employees still prefer on-site arrangements over hybrid and remote work.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: A significant majority of opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, limiting remote access.

ai.title: AI Expertise is Becoming Mainstream in Job Market
ai.subtitle: 43% of roles prioritize AI responsibilities, with 38% requiring AI skills.

industry.title: Industry Roles Exhibit Equal Representation Across Sectors
industry.subtitle: No single sector dominates, but unclassified roles limit overall accessibility.
